title: liatris aspera
intro: Liatris aspera, also known as rough blazing star or prairie gay feather, is a flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Liatris aspera include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Liatris aspera can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
